changelog:
- Critical Bug Fix: Fixed massive AlarmManager wake-lock leak that caused severe CPU hangs after 24/7 runtime
- Android 10 Bug Fix: Stopped silent NoSuchFieldError initialization crashes on older devices
- Backend Networking Fix: Implemented dynamic ping-pong keep-alive checks to purge ghost sockets and audio voiding
- API Command Queue Fix: Bounded memory pools to prevent out-of-memory heap crashes
- Dashboard Audio Fix: Rewrote ArrayBuffer ScriptProcessor queues to prevent huge latency drift and UI rendering blocks.
